signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY | YES | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in January and February, though below market forecasts of 2.4%[2].
